2198120.name: Dragon Inn
2198120.description:
Dragon Inn is a dynamic visualization tool for online roleplaying games. Create your own room, invite others and customize your characters. Track your stats, equipment, spells, features, and status effects, all in one place with Dragon Inn.

Dragon Inn also helps Game Masters with its control panel. In this panel, you can show images, display text, manage NPCs, reveal locations, add equipments to players, set player status effects, and more! It includes its own battle map and token system, so you don't need to worry about setting up the battlefield.

With this mode, Game Masters can easily manage the game and enhance their campaign with powerful visualization tools. Using the Map Tools, you can create battlefields, modify them, add enemy tokens, and even upload custom token images. You can also assign equipment to players, apply status effects, or reward them with money for discovering that hidden stash! Additionally, you can display NPCs, locations, or any text or image you want to share with all players.




With this mode, Players can track and modify their stats and equipments with ease. They can see their classes features, their added spells and their money. Can't find the spell you are looking for? You can add custom spells to your spell book. You can also use notepad feature to take notes. For every NPC Dungeon Master shows, that NPC will be added to your "NPC" tab so you can remember all the people you see it in the campaign!

Even If you are not following a certain ruleset, Dragon Inn provides the flexibility to modify your character to any ruleset.
2198120.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 土耳其语
